metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.13 adds the rule-09 rolling-patch frequency layer: PreToolUse(Edit|Write) DENYs the 4th small edit (≤ 10 lines, < 200 chars) to the same file in one session unless a systematic rewrite (≥ 50 lines / ≥ 1500 chars) has reset the counter.
